message.content:
@startuml

actor Client

participant "RegisterClientUI" as RegisterClientUI
participant "RegisterClientController" as RegisterClientController
participant "app\n:ApplicationPOT" as app
participant "clientService\n:ClientService" as clientService
participant "clientDB\n:ClientDB" as clientDB
participant "client\n:Client" as client
participant "user\n:User" as user
participant "EncryptPassword" as EncryptPassword
participant "Address" as Address
participant "CreditCard" as CreditCard
participant "EmailSender" as EmailSender
participant "DataHandler" as DataHandler

Client -> RegisterClientUI : 1 Engages the register feature/button

RegisterClientUI --> Client : 2 Asks for all the information required\nfor the register (i.e., name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,\nstreetName,doorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,\nCCV)

Client -> RegisterClientUI : 3 Fills all the information required

RegisterClientUI --> Client : 4 Presents the data and asks for a confirmation

Client -> RegisterClientUI : 5 Confirms

RegisterClientUI -> RegisterClientController : 6 registerNewClient(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)

RegisterClientController -> app : 7 create()

app -> clientService : 8 create()
app -> clientDB

RegisterClientController -> clientService : 9 validateInput(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)

alt [if all the information given as input has a valid format]

RegisterClientController -> clientService : 10 newClient(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)

clientService -> client **: 11 create(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)

client -> user **: 12 create(email,password,nif,name)

user -> EncryptPassword : 13 encryptPasswordMD5(password)

client -> Address **: 14 create(latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,doorNumber,postalCode,locality,country)

client -> CreditCard **: 15 create(creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)

RegisterClientController -> clientService : 16 registerNewClient(client)

clientService -> clientDB : 17 addClientToDB(client)

ref over clientDB
SD_CONNECTIONS
end ref

clientDB -> DataHandler : 18 sendEmail(email,subject,body)

RegisterClientUI --> Client : 19 Validates and informs about the success of the operation

else [if any information does not have a valid format]

RegisterClientUI --> Client : 20 Informs the User that the operation\nwas not successful

end

@enduml
